context: Tests whether the agent stores all artifacts under .context/artifacts/<slug>/<date>/ and never uses /tmp or docs/ or any other location. Also checks that the extraction method is noted in overview.md.

checklist.name: Correct base path
checklist.description: setup.sh defines ARTIFACTS as a path starting with .context/artifacts/

checklist.name: Slug format
checklist.description: setup.sh uses a lowercase hyphenated slug (e.g. example-com) as the directory name under .context/artifacts/

checklist.name: Date subdirectory
checklist.description: setup.sh includes a YYYY-MM-DD date subdirectory under the slug directory

checklist.name: No /tmp usage
checklist.description: setup.sh does NOT save any file to /tmp

checklist.name: No docs/ usage
checklist.description: setup.sh does NOT save any file to docs/ or docs/screenshots/

checklist.name: Screenshots under ARTIFACTS
checklist.description: All agent-browser screenshot commands in setup.sh use ${ARTIFACTS}/ as the base path

checklist.name: theme/ subdirectory
checklist.description: setup.sh creates a theme/ subdirectory inside the ARTIFACTS path

checklist.name: overview.md location
checklist.description: overview.md is placed inside .context/artifacts/example-com/2026-03-13/theme/ (not in project root or docs/)

checklist.name: Extraction method noted
checklist.description: overview.md contains a field or note identifying which extraction method was used (agent-browser / curl / manual DevTools)
